title: Better McDonald's Mod
description: This mod adds many well-known products from McDonald's.
body:
![Better McDonald's Mod title](https://i.imgur.com/7tt7UUH.png)

---

The **Better McDonald's Mod** was created by [Kyronis](https://modrinth.com/user/Kyronis). Many well-known products have been added such as:

- 🍔 Big Mac
- 🎁 Happy Meal
- 🥤 Coca-Cola

...and more! Many new 🥩 **ingredients** have been added to prepare the food.

My mod is also available on CurseForge. [Click here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-mcdonalds-mod)

[![Instant Gaming banner](https://i.imgur.com/Yvbk2dn.gif)](https://www.instant-gaming.com/?igr=moritz-htk)

---

# 📢 Announcement
[![Announcement](https://i.imgur.com/xv0g5ny.png)](https://bsky.app/profile/kyronis.net/post/3m63ktnnmyk2j)

---

### 📌🌍 Latest Versions & Supported Languages
A full and always up-to-date version and language list is now available [here](https://kyronis.net/mods/better-mcdonalds-mod) on the official website.

---

### 📖 Wiki
The [Better McDonald's Mod Wiki](https://moddedmc.wiki/project/better-mcdonalds-mod) provides full documentation about blocks, items and functions.

---

### 🔮 Planned Features

- ⚙️ machines for manufacturing
- 🍩 side mod (McCafé, Grimace Shake, Shamrock Shake)

---

---

### 🔗 Dependencies
- 26.1 and above: [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm)
- 1.21.11 and below: [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

---

### 🌐 Links
🌍 Website: [https://kyronis.net/mods/better-mcdonalds-mod](https://kyronis.net/mods/better-mcdonalds-mod)

⚠️ **NOTE**: This is an unofficial modification and is not affiliated with McDonald's Corporation.
